mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_TBL ( ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, ACCOUNT_TYPE, BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE, YIELD_RATE, CURRENCY_TYPE, ACCOUNT_NAME, OPEN_DATE, STATUS, ACCOUNT_PWD ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{customer_id}, #{account_type}, #{balance}, #{interest_rate}, #{yield_rate}, #{currency_type}, #{account_name}, #{open_date}, 'ACTIVE', #{account_pwd} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNT_TBL SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', CLOSE_DATE = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{accountNumber}
